candidates.why: A separate operating-level D&A row exists, but it is not labeled as relating to COGS/cost of sales and appears more like a general operating expense line. Relative to the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of goods sold'), there is no explicit COGS-specific D&A row to add separately.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortization row is visible above the financial section. To avoid unsupported allocation and double counting, do not add any D&A separately to COGS.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating expense line at the same level as the selected SG&A-related rows ('Personnel Expenses', 'Other operating expenses', 'Administrative Expenses'), indicating D&A sits outside those selected buckets and should be added separately later. No more granular SG&A D&A component rows are shown, so the summary row is preferred.

variables.notes: Selected the standalone operating D&A row for XSGA because it appears separate from the chosen SG&A component rows and there is no explicit R&D row in the excerpt.
